message:
Propagate NaN through activation gradients and use deterministic FNV-1a hasher for tensor fingerprints

- Add NaN propagation to backward passes for abs, relu, leaky_relu, elu,
  min, max, and clamp operations in both scalar and tensor autograd
  paths, matching PyTorch's IEEE 754 NaN semantics where gradients
  through NaN inputs produce NaN rather than arbitrary finite values
- Replace std DefaultHasher with a deterministic FNV-1a implementation
  (DetHasher) for TensorMeta::fingerprint64 and ScalarTensor::
  evidence_fingerprint64 to ensure reproducible fingerprints across
  Rust versions, since DefaultHasher's algorithm is not guaranteed to
  be stable

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
